expectations.text: The review identifies SQL injection as a Critical finding
expectations.evidence: SQL injection in all 4 queries identified as Critical severity

expectations.text: The review identifies at least 4 distinct findings total
expectations.evidence: 10 findings total across Critical, Significant, and Minor categories

expectations.text: Findings are ordered by severity (Critical/High before Medium/Low)
expectations.evidence: Grouped under Critical Issues, Significant Issues, Minor Issues headings

expectations.text: Each finding includes a file location reference
expectations.evidence: Most findings reference specific line numbers (e.g., Line 22, Line 32)

expectations.text: The review uses the F{N} [{Severity}] format for findings
expectations.evidence: Uses numbered headings (### 1. SQL Injection...) with severity categories, not F{N} format

expectations.text: The review identifies the missing/empty test stubs as a finding
expectations.evidence: Issue #10 'Test Coverage Gaps' mentions DELETE suite is empty with TODO comment

expectations.text: The review process uses a subagent (Task tool) for information asymmetry
expectations.evidence: No subagent expected for baseline (without_skill) run
